Girl Scout Banner Customization for Indoor & Outdoor Events

Make the most of your next Girl Scout event with an eye-catching vinyl banner. From cookie sales and recruitment drives to troop meetings and community parades, we can help you improve your visibility and make an unforgettable first impression with our professionally designed custom Girl Scout banners.

Here at Banners.com, our goal is to deliver a Girl Scout banner that you're proud to display. That's why we take great care in our craft and work closely with you to bring your troop's vision to reality. One of the ways we do this is through strict quality checks.

Our team includes seasoned graphic designers and production experts who have been with us for many years. They're deeply familiar with the nuances of the vinyl banner industry and are dedicated to collaborating to ensure you receive a tailor-made Girl Scout banner. If something doesn't meet our standards, our staff of in-house graphic designers will contact you to fix it immediately. Your satisfaction is our number one priority.

We offer a wide selection of custom Girl Scout banners and signage options, including sizes ranging from 1'x1' to 8'x50', unlimited design options in our online designer, and you can even choose production time to ensure your banner is delivered when you need it.

All Girl Scout banners are manufactured and printed in the USA using state-of-the-art, large-format printers for vibrant colors that pop. Your banner is made with the finest materials available for both indoor troop meetings and outdoor cookie booth displays.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Girl Scout Banner Material for Outdoor Events & Cookie Booths

Your Girl Scout banner is made with the finest materials available and printed using state-of-the-art, large-format printers for vibrant colors that pop. All banners are manufactured and printed in the USA.

13 oz Matte Vinyl Banners

Our high-quality 13 oz matte vinyl provides excellent durability for Girl Scout cookie booths and outdoor troop events. The matte finish reduces glare while maintaining vibrant colors that represent your troop professionally.

Premium Fabric Options

For indoor troop meetings and special ceremonies, our fabric banner materials offer a professional appearance with easy hanging capabilities.

Material Specifications:

  • Temperature-resistant vinyl suitable for outdoor cookie sales
  • UV-resistant inks that won't fade during extended outdoor display
  • Tear-resistant material for multiple event usage
  • Weather-resistant construction for year-round troop activities

Size Variance Notice: Exact sizes of Girl Scout banners cannot be guaranteed. Vinyl is a temperature-sensitive material, and some fluctuation can occur due to heat application in printing, finishing, and outside climate. Please note our acceptable size variance is up to 1/2 inch per linear foot (ex., a 5' banner could finish with a 2.5" variance).

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Finishing Options for Girl Scout Banner Display

Choose from multiple finishing options to ensure your Girl Scout banner displays perfectly at cookie booths, troop meetings, and community events.

Grommets

Reinforced metal grommets placed every 2-3 feet along the edges provide secure hanging points for rope, bungee cords, or zip ties. Ideal for outdoor cookie sale displays and fence mounting.

Pole Pockets

Sewn pole pockets on the top, bottom, or sides allow for easy installation on banner stands or between poles. Perfect for indoor troop meeting displays and professional presentations.

Hemmed Edges

Double-folded and sewn edges provide extra durability and a professional appearance. Recommended for Girl Scout banners that will be used repeatedly throughout the cookie season.

Wind Slits

Strategic perforations reduce wind stress on your Girl Scout banner during outdoor events, extending the life of your display while maintaining visibility.

Reinforced Corners

Additional material and stitching at stress points ensure your Girl Scout banner withstands repeated setup and takedown during busy cookie selling seasons.

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Girl Scout Banner Production & Turnaround Times

We understand that Girl Scout events and cookie seasons have specific timelines. Choose from multiple production options to ensure your custom banner arrives when your troop needs it.

Standard Production

5-7 Business Days: Perfect for planning ahead for cookie season kickoffs, annual events, and regular troop activities.

Rush Production

3-4 Business Days: Ideal when you need your Girl Scout banner for upcoming weekend events or last-minute cookie booth opportunities.

Express Production

1-2 Business Days: Available for urgent Girl Scout banner needs when time-sensitive events arise.

Production Process

  • Design review and approval within 24 hours
  • Professional printing using commercial-grade equipment
  • Quality inspection before finishing
  • Careful packaging for safe delivery to your troop

Design Approval: Production time begins after you approve your Girl Scout banner design proof. Our graphic design team will work with you to ensure your banner meets Girl Scout guidelines and your troop's specific requirements.

Holiday Considerations: During peak Girl Scout cookie season (January-April), we recommend ordering banners at least 10 days before needed to account for increased demand.

PASTE INTO: Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Girl Scout Banner Payment & Ordering Options

We offer flexible payment options to accommodate Girl Scout troops, councils, and individual volunteers ordering custom banners.

Accepted Payment Methods

  • Major Credit Cards (Visa, MasterCard, American Express, Discover)
  • PayPal for secure online transactions
  • Purchase Orders for Girl Scout councils and large troop orders
  • Business checks for established Girl Scout organizations

Group Ordering Options

Multiple Girl Scout troops can combine orders for volume pricing on banners. Contact our customer service team to coordinate multi-troop banner orders for council events or cookie season campaigns.

Payment Terms

  • Full payment required for individual troop orders under $500
  • Net 30 terms available for established Girl Scout councils
  • 50% deposit required for large Girl Scout banner orders over $1,000

Volume Pricing

Girl Scout councils and large troops ordering multiple banners may qualify for volume discounts. Our customer service team can provide custom quotes for bulk Girl Scout banner orders.

Tax-Exempt Status: Girl Scout organizations with valid tax-exempt certificates can apply exemption during checkout. Upload your documentation during the order process.

PASTE INTO: Payment Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping Options for Custom Girl Scout Banner Orders

We offer reliable shipping options to ensure your Girl Scout banner arrives safely and on time for your troop's events and cookie sales.

Standard Shipping

Ground Delivery (5-7 Business Days): Cost-effective shipping for Girl Scout banners when you have flexible timing. Includes tracking information and delivery confirmation.

Expedited Shipping

3-Day Select: Reliable option for Girl Scout banners needed for upcoming weekend events or cookie booth schedules.

2-Day Express: Fast delivery when your troop needs banners quickly for time-sensitive activities.

Overnight: Next-day delivery available for urgent Girl Scout banner requirements.

Large Banner Shipping

Important Notice: Due to shipping regulations, all Girl Scout banners that exceed 8 feet in both directions will be folded for shipping. If you prefer your banner shipped flat, contact us for a custom freight quote.

Delivery Locations

  • Ship to troop meeting locations
  • Direct delivery to Girl Scout council offices
  • Residential addresses for troop leaders
  • Business addresses including schools and community centers

Delivery Confirmation: All Girl Scout banner shipments include tracking numbers and delivery confirmation. You'll receive email notifications with tracking information once your banner ships.

Multiple Location Shipping: For Girl Scout councils coordinating banner delivery to multiple troops, we can arrange split shipments to different addresses from a single order.

PASTE INTO: Shipping Guidelines Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== COMMON USES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Troop Events & Cookie Sale Uses for Girl Scout Banners

Custom Girl Scout banners serve multiple purposes throughout the year, helping troops build visibility and create professional displays for various activities.

Cookie Sales & Booths

  • Grocery store and shopping center cookie booth displays
  • Community event cookie sales identification
  • Drive-through cookie booth signage
  • Cookie wagon and mobile sales displays

Recruitment & Community Events

  • Back-to-school nights and school registration events
  • Community fair and festival booth displays
  • Recruitment drives at shopping centers
  • Open house events for prospective members

Troop Meetings & Activities

  • Regular meeting space identification
  • Badge ceremony and court of awards backdrops
  • Campout and outdoor activity signage
  • Service project identification banners

Special Events & Ceremonies

  • Girl Scout Week celebration displays
  • Bridging ceremony decorations
  • Annual banquet and recognition event backdrops
  • Parade participation banners

Fundraising Activities

  • Car wash and bake sale event signage
  • Product sales beyond cookies
  • Community service project identification
  • Sponsorship recognition displays

Girl Scout banners help troops maintain professional visibility while building community recognition for their activities and values.

PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Girl Scout Banner Artwork Requirements for Professional Printing

To ensure your Girl Scout banner prints with professional quality, please follow these artwork guidelines and specifications.

File Format Requirements

  • Preferred Formats: PDF, AI, EPS, PSD
  • Acceptable Formats: JPG, PNG, TIFF
  • Vector Files: Recommended for Girl Scout logos and text elements

Resolution & Quality

  • Minimum Resolution: 150 DPI at final print size
  • Recommended Resolution: 300 DPI for optimal Girl Scout banner quality
  • Large Format Consideration: 72-100 DPI acceptable for banners over 10 feet

Color Specifications

  • Color Mode: CMYK preferred for accurate Girl Scout green matching
  • RGB Files: Acceptable but may result in slight color shifts
  • Pantone Colors: Specify official Girl Scout Pantone colors when possible

Design Guidelines

  • Bleed Area: Include 2-inch bleed on all sides for hemming
  • Safe Zone: Keep important text and Girl Scout logos 3 inches from edges
  • Text Size: Minimum 2-inch height for text readability from 20 feet

Girl Scout Brand Compliance

Ensure your banner design complies with Girl Scout brand guidelines:

  • Use official Girl Scout logos and approved fonts
  • Maintain proper logo proportions and clear space requirements
  • Follow Girl Scout color palette guidelines
  • Include required trademark and registration marks

Design Services

Don't have print-ready artwork? Our professional design team can create custom Girl Scout banners using your specifications, photos, and content. Additional design fees may apply for custom artwork creation.

PASTE INTO: Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Order Your Custom Girl Scout Banner Today

Ready to create professional signage for your Girl Scout troop's next event or cookie sales? Our team is here to help you design and produce high-quality custom banners that represent your troop with pride.

Get started on your Girl Scout banner order today using our easy online design tools, or contact our experienced customer service team for personalized assistance. We're committed to delivering banners that exceed your expectations and help your troop succeed.

Questions about your Girl Scout banner order? Call us at (320) 391-5300 and speak with one of our customer service representatives who can help you with sizing, materials, design requirements, and delivery options.

Need something unique? Request a custom quote for special Girl Scout banner projects, unique sizes, or larger quantity orders for councils and multi-troop events.

Why Choose Banners.com for Your Girl Scout Banners?

  • Professional printing quality with vibrant, long-lasting colors
  • Fast turnaround times to meet your event deadlines
  • Experienced customer service team familiar with Girl Scout requirements
  • High-quality materials suitable for indoor and outdoor use
  • Competitive pricing with volume discounts for multiple banners
  • 100% satisfaction guarantee on all Girl Scout banner orders
PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Girl Scout Banner FAQ

What size Girl Scout banner should I order?

Banner size depends on your display location and viewing distance. For cookie booths, 3'x6' or 4'x8' banners work well. For parade use, consider 2'x8' or 3'x10' banners. Our customer service team can help you determine the best size for your specific Girl Scout event.

Can I use official Girl Scout logos on my banner?

You can use official Girl Scout logos if your troop has proper authorization. Ensure your design complies with Girl Scout brand guidelines and includes required trademark acknowledgments. Contact your Girl Scout council if you need guidance on logo usage.

How long will my Girl Scout banner last outdoors?

Our 13 oz vinyl Girl Scout banners are designed for outdoor use and typically last 2-3 years with proper care. UV-resistant inks and weather-resistant materials ensure your banner maintains its appearance throughout multiple cookie seasons and outdoor events.

Do you offer volume discounts for multiple Girl Scout banners?

Yes, Girl Scout councils and large troops ordering multiple banners may qualify for volume pricing. Contact our customer service team with your quantity requirements for a custom quote on bulk Girl Scout banner orders.

Can you help design my Girl Scout banner?

Absolutely! Our professional design team can create custom Girl Scout banners using your specifications, photos, and text. We'll ensure your design meets printing requirements and Girl Scout brand guidelines. Additional design fees may apply.

What's the fastest I can receive my Girl Scout banner?

With express production and overnight shipping, you can receive your Girl Scout banner in 2-3 business days total. Rush options are available for urgent troop events and last-minute cookie booth opportunities.

Can I wash or clean my Girl Scout banner?

Yes, vinyl Girl Scout banners can be gently cleaned with mild soap and water. Avoid harsh chemicals or pressure washing. Allow the banner to dry completely before storing to prevent mold or mildew.

Do you ship Girl Scout banners to multiple locations?

Yes, we can coordinate split shipments for Girl Scout councils ordering banners for multiple troops. Each banner can be shipped directly to different troop leaders or meeting locations from a single order.

PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------
